--- INSURANCENOTE TEST FIXTURE ---
Document Title: Custom Rider Endorsement Note
Document Type: Ingest Text Note

Rule 1.1: Comprehensive insurance benefits are paid only to the registered policy owners listed on the contract summary.
Rule 1.2: If the driver participates in street racing, speed trials, or stunt driving on public roads, all coverages are immediately voided.
Rule 1.3: Under no circumstances shall claims be reimbursed for accidents occurring under the influence of illegal substances or alcohol level exceeding 0.08%.
Rule 1.4: Police reports must be requested within 24 hours of the accident and submitted alongside the claim application.
